since_last: 33% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.12%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.31% · BTC -4.92% · Gold -3.30% · Nasdaq100 -1.13%. 33% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.12%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.12%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.11%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at -7.83%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +3.94%, ZBRA +3.77%, WDAY +3.70%, PUBM +3.30%, INTU +2.86%. Laggards: SMR -7.83%, OKLO -6.87%, OKLO -6.87%, BBAI -6.23%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.99% at $157.65
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.99% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
